title: paeonia lactiflora var. trichocarpa
intro: Paeonia lactiflora var. trichocarpa, also known as the tree peony or Chinese peony, is a variety of flowering plant in the Paeoniaceae family, characterized by its large, showy flowers and fragrant foliage. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia lactiflora var. trichocarpa are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and osteoporosis. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried roots, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
